name: FAHAD MD
description: Professional WhatsApp Bot powered by Baileys with MongoDB session store, QR + Pair Code linking, Web Dashboard, Plugin system, Auto-Forward and more.

MONGODB_URI.description: MongoDB connection string used to store the WhatsApp session, settings, users and groups.

DASHBOARD_PASSWORD.description: Password to access the web dashboard (used to link device via QR/Pair and change settings).

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Bot owner WhatsApp number with country code, digits only, e.g. 923014875344

SUPPORT_NUMBER.description: Support contact number shown in the bot menu.

BOT_NAME.description: Name of the bot shown in menus and browser pairing.

SESSION_ID.description: Unique session id, lets you run multiple bot instances on one MongoDB database.
